title: PrideMarkings
description: This mod is a simple mod that adds pride flag wall markings.
body:
This mod is a sister mod of [ModernMarkings](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernmarkings) that adds pride flags that you can place on walls.
![A showcase of the flags in this mod, arranged to say "pride markings" with rainbow flags](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aee708cb88e8a0cf739283af06fc4d04e272d28.png)

![A showcase of the flags in this mod, with various flags placed on walls.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c19e871f5e65b8764e89688d2ab13fe689ff6f55.png)
